title: syzygium costulatum
intro: Syzygium costulatum, also known as the Mountain Apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae native to the mountainous regions of Papua New Guinea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Syzygium costulatum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and providing antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Syzygium costulatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is traditionally used by locals in Papua New Guinea to treat various health ailments.
